pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (minutes)
pollInterval.description: How often to fetch weather data

hotThreshold.title: Hot Temperature Threshold (°C)
hotThreshold.description: Above this temperature, sunny weather triggers summer auto-sun mode instead of winter tilt

lookaheadHours.title: Forecast Lookahead (hours)
lookaheadHours.description: How many hours ahead to check for sun
